name: Mina
text: Sixteen glass cells, one stable preview. The full image arrived without moving the frame.

name: Jon Bell
text: A compact contract lets the client reserve the right geometry before the API finishes.

name: Rae
text: The preview packet is not the story. It simply gives the story a place to land.

name: Noah
text: Fixed-size data makes the first render deterministic and easy to test.

name: Iris
text: Existing REST and GraphQL paths keep carrying the full content independently.

name: Sam
text: A protocol earns trust when its limits are as explicit as its benchmark.

name: Avery
text: One interaction byte carries eight viewer-specific boolean states.

name: Nico
text: Protocol version lives in the packet, so incompatible clients can fall back safely.

name: June
text: The SDK stays synchronous and has no runtime dependencies.

name: Kai
text: Ten previews need 160 bytes before their full content arrives.
